name: IBM DOORS Next
description: An enterprise requirements-management platform used on regulated aerospace programmes to control requirement sets, traceability, and review workflows.
whyUseIt: DOORS Next matters because complex aerospace programmes live or die on traceability. It helps keep requirements, changes, and evidence relationships visible across long development cycles.
fieldPosition: Systems engineering, compliance, and certification evidence management
engineerWorkflow: Capture system requirements, relate them to hazards or regulations, allocate them to subsystems, then track verification evidence as the design matures.
managerExpects: Clear ownership, reviewable baselines, and no mystery requirements hiding in emails or slide decks.
demoDescription: Build a small requirement tree for a UAV mission and link one requirement through to a proposed verification activity.
beginnerMistakes: Loading the tool with vague statements that cannot be verified
Treating traceability as admin work instead of design infrastructure
